zh.lifeSummary: 當Reynold Grey II於1362年出生在威爾士丹比爾盧時，他的父親Reynold Grey40歲，母親Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn35歲。他於大約1378年11月25日與Joan Astley結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1440年9月30日在威爾士丹比爾盧享年78歲，埋葬在英國越可爾利也瓦利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reynold Grey II于1362年出生在威尔士丹比爾盧时，他的父亲Reynold Grey40岁，母亲Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn35岁。他于大约1378年11月25日与Joan Astley结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1440年9月30日在威尔士丹比爾盧享年78岁，埋葬在英国越可爾利也瓦利。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Reynold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Reinald, Reynaud, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ragin ‘advice, decision’ + wald ‘ruler’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them into England. In modern use, the given name sometimes represents a transferred use of the surname derived from the Norman personal name.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Reynold Grey II was born in 1362, in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales, his father, Reynold Grey, was 40 and his mother, Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn, was 35. He married Joan Astley about 25 November 1378. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 30 September 1440, in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales, at the age of 78, and was buried in Rievaulx, Yorkshire, England.

fr.Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales, United King: Ruthin, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reynold Grey II est né en 1362, à Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles, son père, Reynold Grey, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Joan Astley environ 25 novembre 1378. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 30 septembre 1440, à Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Rievaulx, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.Castle Acre, Norfolk, England: Castle Acre, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Reynold Grey II 1362 in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reynold Grey 40 und seine Mutter Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn 35. Er hat um 25. November 1378 Joan Astley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 30. September 1440 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales und wurde in Rievaulx, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reynold Grey II è nato il nel 1362 nel Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles, il suo padre, Reynold Grey, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Joan Astley circa 25 novembre 1378. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 30 settembre 1440, nel Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Rievaulx, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Reynold Grey IIが1362年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアルスインで生まれた時，父Reynold Greyは40歳，母Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthynは35歳であった。約1378年11月25日にJoan Astleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1440年9月30日にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアルスインで78歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアリーヴァウルックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Reynold Grey II(이)가 1362년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루스인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reynold Grey(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1378년 11월 25일 Joan Astley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1440년 9월 30일 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루스인에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 리에바에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reynold Grey II nasceu em 1362, em Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, seu pai, Reynold Grey, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Astley aproximadamente 25 de novembro de 1378. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de setembro de 1440, em Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Rievaulx, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reynold Grey II родился в 1362 г. в местности рутин, денбаишир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Reynold Grey было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Astley около 25 ноября 1378 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 30 сентября 1440 г. в местности рутин, денбаишир, Уэльс в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности риеваулкс, еркшир, Англия.

Se casó con Joan Astley aproximadamente 25 de noviembre de 1378. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 30 de septiembre de 1440, en Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Rievaulx, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
